explanation: The original command is already a valid test case for the Sigma rule. No mutation is needed to trigger the detection.
Single quotes are used instead of double quotes to test if the detection is resilient to quote insertion/substitution.
Reordered arguments to test if the detection is resilient to reordering while preserving the command's functionality.
Inserted an escape character (`) after the name to test if the detection is resilient to minor syntax variations.
Used Set-ItemProperty instead of New-ItemProperty to test if the detection is resilient to equivalent cmdlet substitution.
Mixed quote types (double and single) to test if the detection is resilient to quote insertion/substitution.
